message:
🌱 Add cortex: Switch Cortex Ruler to query Query Frontend mission (#1326)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cortex-5105-switch-cortex-ruler-to-query-query-frontend",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cortex: Switch Cortex Ruler to query Query Frontend",
+    "description": "Switch Cortex Ruler to query Query Frontend. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cortex deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cortex version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex\nhelm list -n cortex 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cortex installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cortex configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cortex configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex\nkubectl get configmap -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cortex\n```\nAs we can see from the Cortex architecture https://cortexmetrics.io/docs/architecture/, Ruler queries ingesters (and store gateways) to get data for rules evaluation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Switch Cortex Ruler to query Query Frontend",
+        "description": "Add `ruler.frontend-address` to allow query to query frontends instead of ingesters. If `-ruler.frontend-address` is set, rulers query to query frontends for evaluating rules. It can support query frontend features like vertical query sharding.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cortex -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cortex\nkubectl get events -n cortex --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Switch Cortex Ruler to query Query Frontend\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Add `ruler.frontend-address` to allow query to query frontends instead of ingesters. If `-ruler.frontend-address` is set, rulers query to query frontends for evaluating rules. It can support query frontend features like vertical query sharding.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
